input.prompt-input[type=\"text\"].background: rgb(45, 45, 45) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
input.prompt-input[type=\"text\"].font-family: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, "Fira Sans", "Droid Sans", "Helvetica Neue", sans-serif

input.task-list-item-checkbox[data-line=.background: rgb(45, 45, 45) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"].background: rgb(45, 45, 45) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(214, 61, 79) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(45, 45, 45) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
input[type=\"search\"].font-family: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, "Fira Sans", "Droid Sans", "Helvetica Neue", sans-serif

input[type=\"text\"].background: rgb(45, 45, 45) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
input[type=\"text\"].font-family: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, "Fira Sans", "Droid Sans", "Helvetica Neue", sans-serif
